text: Good evening. Let’s reflect on your day.
How would you describe your day?

When things went wrong, what was your reaction?
options: Improve myself|Blame situation|Wait for help|Feel stuck
answer=Improve myself:A1_R_INT;answer=Blame situation|Wait for help|Feel stuck:A1_R_EXT

text: You showed ownership today. You took control of situations.
Today felt influenced by external factors. But you still had choices.

answer=Helped others|Did extra work:A2_R_CON;answer=Expected recognition|Felt others didn’t contribute:A2_R_ENT

text: You contributed beyond expectations. That builds real value.
